01 — About

The Founder

Hi, I am ItzYUG — a hosting infrastructure specialist who builds systems that don't just run, they dominate. My work sits at the intersection of technical depth and entrepreneurial vision.

With hands-on expertise spanning Linux administration, VPS management, server infrastructure and premium customer experience design, I build hosting ecosystems engineered for the next decade.

Currently leading CrazeByte as Founder & Chairman — a next-generation hosting platform — while contributing as Co-Founder of Hexium Nodes, pushing the boundaries of what reliable hosting infrastructure looks like.

// SUBSIDIARY VENTURE
CrazeByte Dev Studio
An elite development studio operating under the CrazeByte umbrella. We supply skilled developers across every discipline — connecting clients with the exact talent they need, at startup speed.
🌐 Website Dev 🎮 Minecraft Dev 🤖 Discord Bots 🖥️ VPS Setup 🦕 Pterodactyl Dev ⚙️ Custom Solutions

03 — Journey

Experience Timeline

2024
Hosting Infrastructure Management
Began deep specialization in hosting infrastructure — mastering server configuration, VPS management, Linux administration, and delivering premium technical support. Built the technical foundation that underpins every venture.

Founder & Chairman — CrazeByte
Founded CrazeByte — a next-generation premium hosting platform — and simultaneously launched CrazeByte Dev Studio, a developer supply subsidiary serving clients across web, Discord, Minecraft, VPS, and Pterodactyl development.
Current · Seeking Investment
